summary: At GTC 2026, Nvidia expanded the Vera Rubin platform it introduced at CES with custom CPU racks, dedicated inference chips, a new storage architecture, an inference operating system, open model alliances, and agent security software. title: State of Open Source on Hugging Face: Spring 2026
OpenAI ships GPT-5.4 mini and nano, faster and more capable but up to 4x pricier
summary: OpenAI has released two new compact models—GPT-5.4 mini and nano—built for coding assistants, subagents, and computer control. GPT-5.4 mini nearly matches the full model's performance, but both new models come with a steep price hike over their predecessors.
